Core Pillars

Why CodeDynasty

Lightning Fast

Built for performance from the ground up. Speed, caching, and clean execution are baked into every module.

Developer First

Intuitive API design and detailed documentation. Zero bloat, maximum developer ergonomics.

Type Safe

Full TypeScript integration with strict contracts and type inference. Reduce runtime errors to zero.

Fully Customizable

Modularity allows you to customize and extend behaviors without hacking core components.

Community Driven

Built openly. We integrate issues, feature requests, and community contributions to build better ecosystems.

Cloud Ready

Perfect runtime abstraction for serverless, edge architectures, or docker containers. Deploy anywhere instantly.

Our Creations

Open Source Projects

JP
API Framework

Jetpath

A performance-first cross-runtime API framework without the boilerplate.

16 TypeScript • MIT
C
UI Framework

Cradova

A modern UI framework for building fast and responsive web applications.

28 JavaScript • MIT
E
Database

Exabase

A scaling focused distributed NoSQL database with strong data consistency.

7 Go • MIT
JF
API Client

Jetflare

A type-safe API client with built-in error handling and caching.

3 TypeScript • MIT
SB
Database ORM

SQLiteBruv

A type-safe SQLite query builder with D1/Turso support.

17 TypeScript • MIT
D
Static Site Generator

Docmach

A Markdown-powered static site generator for blogs and documentation.

1 TypeScript • MIT
